stimulus: Welcome to the experiment! Press any key to begin.

Please use headphones for the duration of the study.

Within each trial, you will hear a sound and then be presented with an image in the center of your screen.

Press the '1' key if what you hear matches what you see.

Press the '0' key if what you hear does not match what you see.

Try to respond as quickly and accurately as you can.

Press any key to begin.

You will now complete 4 short practice trials.

This is just to help you get familiar with the task.

Press any key to begin.
Practice complete. Press any key to begin the real experiment.
